scripts.build:frontend: cd src/frontend && npx parcel build index.html --dist-dir build --public-url ./
scripts.install:all: cd src/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.railway:build: cd src/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npx parcel build index.html --dist-dir build --public-url /
scripts.render:build: npm install --prefix src/backend && npm install --prefix src/frontend && cd src/frontend && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=460 ./node_modules/.bin/parcel build index.html --dist-dir build --public-url / --no-cache
